positive: A stylized, symmetrical minimalist depiction of a vibrant forest biome. The composition features overlapping silhouettes of diverse, fantastical flora and fauna (e.g., bioluminescent mushrooms, gracefully curved jungle vines, stylized tropical birds). The overall color palette is jewel-toned and highly saturated (deep emerald, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, contrasting with bright lime green accents). Use heavy outlines and negative space to emphasize clean, bold shapes suitable for apparel printing. The style should evoke a blend of Art Deco geometric abstraction and intricate modern linework, rendered with high contrast and strong, deep blacks. Centered, vertical composition, suitable for a repeat pattern or a central graphic.
